title: Variables in command files not support in +define+
body:
Hi, All
I just try the -c option for command file for iverilog, it seems +define+ is not support $(varname), ${varname}, here is my code and cmd file
test.v
```verilog
module print;
    always@(*)begin
        if (`PRINT_COND) begin
            $display("Printing...");
        end
    end
endmodule

module test;
    wire print_cond = 1'b1; 
    print dut();
endmodule
```
ivlcmd
```
+define+PRINT_COND=$(TB).print_cond
```
run in bash
```bash
export TB=test;iverilog test.v -civlcmd
```
Error
```
test.v:4: error: malformed statement
test.v:3: error: Malformed conditional expression.
test.v:6: syntax error
test.v:9: error: invalid module item.
```
Any idea?
code_blocks:
test.v:4: error: malformed statement
test.v:3: error: Malformed conditional expression.
test.v:6: syntax error
test.v:9: error: invalid module item.
